name: primekg

env_axis.name: source_resource
values: 20 underlying databases including DrugBank, DisGeNET, HPO, MeSH, ...
env_axis.shift_mechanism: different source DBs encode different ontology choices for overlapping biology

ood_protocol.name: primekg-source-split
ood_protocol.ref: Chandak et al. 2023 Scientific Data; TxGNN (Huang 2023 Nat Med) held-out-disease evaluation

edge_types: 30 relation types including drug-drug, drug-disease, disease-disease, protein-protein, ...

facts: 129,375 nodes / 4,050,249 edges / 10 node types / 30 edge types / 20 source resources; TxGNN (Huang 2023 Nat Med) zero-shot drug-repurposing baseline.
hypotheses: The typed-edge conditional distribution is not genuinely 20-way distinct across source DBs: sources mostly agree, collapsing the effective environment cardinality to ~3-5.
TxGNN's held-out-disease shift manifests only at the node-neighborhood level, not at the edge-type level.
intuitions: The full TxGNN holdout protocol and replication attempts likely exist in the literature.
Head-to-head PrimeKG vs Hetionet benchmarks probably exist for 2024-25.
PrimeKG version-diff papers (Dec 2023 update vs original) likely exist.
unknowns: 'Disease' is an unstable cross-resource primitive — different source DBs use incompatible disease ontologies for the same physical phenomenon, and there is no established label for this ontology drift across resources as a shift type.
Whether the integration step creates or averages out the cross-resource shift cannot be determined from the integrated KG alone.
epistemic_state.boundary: T=0 (snapshot, no dynamics) — a version-diff cannot supply this, since the deltas are too discrete to constitute a temporal axis.

representational_commitments: Integrated ontology — disease/drug/gene equivalences across 20 sources resolved by curation
Source-resource provenance preserved per edge — the env handle hinges on this
PrimeKG's specific version (Dec 2023 update) is one snapshot of an evolving integration
Edges stored bidirectionally in kg.csv: 8,100,498 rows = 4,050,249 canonical edges × 2 directions. edges.parquet faithfully preserves this; deduplication is the consumer's choice.
Edge source_resource encoded as 'x_source||y_source' (concatenation of head and tail node sources) since PrimeKG kg.csv lacks an explicit per-edge source field
